summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AURIONA Launcher UI. All major functionality works correctly on desktop, but found critical mobile responsiveness issue with command bar submit button.

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button extends beyond viewport on mobile/tablet screens
ui_bugs.description: Command bar has fixed width of 600px causing submit button to be positioned outside viewport on tablet (768px) and mobile (390px). Button position x=915 exceeds screen width.

passed_tests: System header displays AURIONA.OS title, time, signal, wifi, battery
All 6 navigation menu items present and functional
Menu clicks load correct sections with mock data
Command bar accepts input and executes commands
Command 'system status' shows dashboard with all widgets
Back button returns from System Status to menu
All sections render correctly (Messages: 4, Calls: 3, Contacts: 4, Apps: 8, Files: 6, Settings: 6)
Toast notifications appear for commands and errors
Design aesthetic matches requirements (cyan/teal, violet/purple, glass panels, dark theme)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix command bar responsiveness by making the submit button accessible on mobile/tablet viewports. Consider using responsive width classes instead of fixed 600px width.
